species.distribution: Borneo, Lesser Sunda Isls, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Taiwan. LUZON: Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Sarangani, PANAY.
species.notes: Probably a natural hybrid. According to Kramer (1971): “The type of this ‘species’ is intermediate between T. luzonicum and T. pinnatum; there are 25-30 intermediates… Their status is not clear. They occur throughout the common range of the two species”.
